{"society_power": 2.0, "state_power": 2.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Leopold II establishes Congo Free State as private colony", "reasoning": "The Congo Free State was newly proclaimed (1885) as Leopold II's personal domain, with only nascent, coastal and riverine administrative reach that depended on mercenaries and the Force Publique rather than pervasive control, so state power was weak. Indigenous societies had traditional authority structures but no autonomous organization capable of constraining the colonial project, which was already dismantling and coercing them, leaving society power very low."}
